tagline: Building a nationalist, democratic, and people-centric ICT sector in the Philippines
about_text:
The Computer Professionals' Union (CPU) is a mass organization of ICT professionals, students, and advocates committed to advancing a nationalist, democratic, and people-centered information and communications technology sector in the Philippines.

We believe that technology must serve the people - not just profits, not surveillance, not exploitation. Founded by Filipino ICT workers, CPU organizes around issues of digital rights, workers' welfare in the tech industry, free and open source software, affordable internet access, and technology education that empowers communities.

We are developers, designers, network engineers, cybersecurity specialists, educators, and students united by the conviction that another digital world is possible - one built on solidarity, justice, and genuine human need.
